steps.name: the SauceDemo login page is opened on Android Chrome
the login page is readable

elements.name: Add every fourth product and validate checkout overview before finishing

steps.name: I login with retry using sauce user data "standard_user"
the sauce user should reach the inventory page
I add every 4th product to the cart
I checkout using customer data "sunai_murugan"
the checkout overview should show the selected products and valid payment shipping and price totals
I finish the checkout
the checkout should complete successfully
the SauceDemo login page is opened on Android Chrome
the login page is readable

elements.name: Add all products and validate checkout overview before finishing

steps.name: I login with retry using sauce user data "standard_user"
the sauce user should reach the inventory page
I add all products to the cart
I checkout using customer data "sunai_murugan"
the checkout overview should show the selected products and valid payment shipping and price totals
I finish the checkout
the checkout should complete successfully
the SauceDemo login page is opened on Android Chrome
the login page is readable

elements.name: Empty cart checkout overview shows zero totals

steps.name: I login with retry using sauce user data "standard_user"

I open checkout from the cart without adding products
I submit checkout information using customer data "sunai_murugan"
the checkout overview should show no products and zero price totals
